query: heavy fog mist obscured figure barely visible silhouette
message: sub:bad_or_no_details/fog_silhouette — anti_aesthetic — figures lost in mist, dissolved silhouettes, monochrome haze

response.objective_caption: A landscape photograph of a tall deciduous tree standing in a grassy field, flanked by darker leafy trees on the left and right. Dense fog envelops the background and upper sky, obscuring the horizon and distant details. Two small vertical shapes are visible in the far field. The foreground tree on the left shows detailed leaf silhouettes against the bright background. A watermark reading '© skewsme.dpchallenge.com' appears in the lower right corner.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A melancholic landscape suffused with heavy fog, where a tall central tree and surrounding foliage appear as dark silhouettes against a washed-out, muted sky. The image exhibits a desaturated, faded palette and oppressively low contrast that crushes tonal separation, creating a heavy, isolating atmosphere. Distant elements dissolve into ghostly, indistinct shapes, conveying a pervasive sense of atmospheric distress and unease. A watermark appears in the lower right corner.
